zh.lifeSummary: 當Dame Mary Montfort於1440年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可特福德時，她的父親Osbert Mondeford20歲，母親Elizabeth Berney11歲。她於1478年與Sir William Tyndale在英國諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1496年在她的家鄉享年56歲。

nameMeanings.name: Montfort
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and Breton: variant of   Monfort   1. This surname is most common in Brittany and Haute-Savoie. See also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort: habitational name from Montfoort in Utrecht. It is a cognate of 1 above (see Monfort 1) and also its altered form (or perhaps vice versa).
English (of Norman origin): very rare variant of   Mountford  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Monfort
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Jacques, Marcel, Monique, Wilner.

French and Breton: habitational name from any of numerous places called Montfort, from Old French mont ‘hill’ (see Mont 1) + fort ‘strong, impregnable’ (from Latin fortis). This surname is by far most common in Brittany. It is also found in Haiti. Compare Montfort 1, see also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort, a variant of Montfort 2 and also a cognate of the French name in 1 above and an altered form of its variant Montfort 1 (or perhaps vice versa).

variants.name: Monforte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Carmela, Carmine, Rocco, Rosaria, Sal.  Spanish Carlos, Francisco, Luis, Medardo.

Italian and Spanish: habitational name from any of numerous places called Monforte, from Latin mons ‘mountain’ (genitive montis) + fortis ‘strong’, probably a reference to the strategic position of these locations.
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Montfort  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Dame
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Informal short form of   David  , sometimes bestowed as an independent given name.

variants.name: David
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the greatest of all the kings of Israel, whose history is recounted with great vividness in the first and second books of Samuel and elsewhere. As a boy he killed the giant Philistine Goliath with his slingshot. As king of Judah, and later of all Israel, he expanded the power of the Israelites and established the security of their kingdom. He was also noted as a poet, many of the Psalms being attributed to him. The Hebrew derivation of the name is uncertain; it is said by some to represent a nursery word meaning ‘darling’. It is a very popular Jewish name, but is almost equally common among Gentiles in the English-speaking world. It is particularly common in Wales and Scotland, having been borne by the patron saint of Wales (  see  Dewi   ) and by two medieval kings of Scotland.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

en.lifeSummary: When Dame Mary Montfort was born in 1440, in Thetford, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Osbert Mondeford, was 20 and her mother, Elizabeth Berney, was 11. She married Sir William Tyndale in 1478, in Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died in 1496, in her hometown, at the age of 56.

Elle a épousé Sir William Tyndale en 1478, à Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée en 1496, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 56 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Dame Mary Montfort(이)가 1440년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 테트퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Osbert Mondeford(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Berney(은)는 11세였다. 그녀는 1478년 영국 노르폴크에서 Sir William Tyndale(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1496년 그녀의 고향에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Sir William Tyndale em 1478, em Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1496, em sua cidade natal, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dame Mary Montfort родилась в 1440 г. в местности тетфорд, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Osbert Mondeford было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Berney, 11. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Tyndale в 1478 г. в местности норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла в 1496 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 56 лет.
